The event will run from 6:00 p.m. to 9:30 p.m. and is set to attract hundreds of attendees. This exclusive evening is a significant annual gala organized by JASDFW.

news.summary: In the latest report released today, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country dropped to 4.8% in the month of June. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month when the rate stood at 5.2%. The total number of unemployed individuals decreased by 200,000 to reach 1.5 million people actively seeking employment. Additionally, the economy added 350,000 new jobs during the same period, with the majority of the growth seen in the service and manufacturing sectors. This positive trend indicates a resilient job market amidst ongoing challenges.
news.headline: Howmet Aerospace's board has given approval for dividends on their common and preferred stocks.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: The US expects the EU will delay planned tariff retaliation.

news.summary: Dive into the world of DTF and UV DTF transfers with ease through DTFPrinter.com, a new online platform developed for crafters across the nation. Offering fast, vibrant, and no-mess transfers with professional-quality outcomes, this service comes with zero minimum requirements. Launched from Louisville, Kentucky on April 9, 2025, this innovative website caters to those looking to craft custom designs with precision and quality.
news.headline: DTFPrinter.com offers fast, no-mess DTF and UV DTF transfers with zero minimums, now nationwide. Crafters rejoice! #RevolutionizingPrinting

news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a 9% surge on April 9, reaching around $83,000 after US President Donald Trump announced a pause on tariffs for non-retaliating countries. The cryptocurrency's price is currently within a falling wedge pattern on its daily chart dating back to December 2024, with a potential breakout target of $100,000 by June if the upper trendline at $83,000 is breached. Onchain data supports the bullish outlook, with a critical support zone between $65,000 and $71,000 reinforcing the potential surge. However, breaking below this range could lead to a decline towards $50,000. The 50-week exponential moving average at around $77,760 is identified as a crucial support level, with historical patterns suggesting a rebound could lead to a retest of $100,000 while a breakdown could result in further declines. It is important for readers to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin's $100K target is now in focus after a Trump tariff pause boosts market sentiment, with BTC surging by 9% to near $83,000 on April 9, hinting at a potential breakout to $100,000. Onchain data points to a bullish outlook, with a critical support zone at $65K-$71K. Breaking below this range could lead to a decline towards $50,000, while a rebound could pave the way for a retest of the $100,000 mark.

news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart held its investment meeting to showcase its business operations and strategy. The leadership team emphasized the company's consistency and strength, highlighting its resiliency and innovation in delivering growth and shareholder value. Doug McMillon, Walmart Inc.'s president and CEO, expressed confidence in Walmart's ability to adapt to changing environments, citing improved business flexibility. The meeting aimed to demonstrate Walmart's ability to navigate challenges, ensuring a promising future for the company.
news.headline: Walmart reiterates successful strategy in investment meeting, confident in ability to adapt and grow. CEO Doug McMillon positive about navigating dynamic business landscape.

news.summary: Owens & Minor, Inc. (NYSE: OMI) of Richmond, Virginia, revealed significant progress in enhancing the medical distribution capabilities of its Products & Healthcare Services (P&HS) division. The company, known for supplying vital products and services to numerous healthcare clients, achieved these milestones through recent investments in cutting-edge technology, automation, and analytics. The strategic focus on boosting efficiencies in the P&HS segment is aimed at better serving thousands of healthcare customers.
news.headline: Owens & Minor (NYSE: OMI) announces innovations in medical distribution, investing in technology for efficiency.

news.summary: In Rochester, New York on April 9, 2025, Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a prominent beverage alcohol company, revealed a deal with The Wine Group to sell off mainly mainstream wine brands, vineyards, and facilities from its wine collection. The agreement is contingent on meeting specific closing requirements, such as obtaining regulatory consent, and is anticipated to finalize right after the conclusion of Constellation's first quarter in its fiscal year 2026.
news.headline: Constellation Brands to sell mainstream wine brands to The Wine Group, repositioning to higher-growth, higher-margin portfolio. Expected to close after Q1 2026.

news.summary: An REIT based in Washington has recently announced measures to adjust its payout ratio and allocate capital for a significant opportunity set. The goal of these actions is to ensure a more balanced distribution of funds and to capitalize on potential growth prospects. This strategic move reflects the company's commitment to optimizing its financial performance and leveraging opportunities in the market. The specific figures regarding the payout ratio adjustment and capital allocation have not been disclosed publicly.
news.headline: Easterly Gov Properties reduces dividend, proposes reverse stock split, reaffirms 2025 goals to enhance growth strategy.

news.summary: Oakland-based company The Clorox Company (NYSE: CLX) is set to release its third-quarter fiscal year 2025 results on May 5, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET, with the press release and prepared management remarks being posted at that time.

As one of the leading investor-owned energy-delivery firms in the U.S., the company operates in New York and has a significant presence in the sector. Traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ED, Con Edison is closely watched by investors and analysts for its performance. The report will provide insights into the company's earnings and financial health, affecting its stock value and market perception. Stay tuned for the official numbers and analysis on May 1, 2025.

news.summary: Orlando, Florida - April 9, 2025 - Global Blockchain Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: GBBK) has announced its decision to end operations on April 14, 2025. The company will redeem all outstanding shares of common stock included in the units from its initial public offering, known as public shares, within ten business days following the Record Date of April 14, 2025. As of this date, Global Blockchain Acquisition Corp. will not proceed with an initial business combination as planned by April 12, 2025.
news.headline: Global Blockchain Acquisition Corp. will dissolve, redeeming all public shares by April 14, 2025 due to no business combination.

news.summary: Tempest Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company traded on Nasdaq as TPST, based in Brisbane, California, revealed on April 9, 2025, its intent to investigate various strategic options to progress its clinical stage projects and enhance shareholder value. The company is contemplating actions like mergers, acquisitions, partnerships, joint ventures, licensing agreements, or other strategic deals. To aid in this evaluation process, Tempest Therapeutics has enlisted the expertise of MTS Health Partners, L.P., a renowned financial advisor in the biotechnology sector. This move signifies the company's commitment to maximizing its potential and delivering innovative cancer treatments.
news.headline: Tempest Therapeutics, Inc. plans to explore strategic alternatives with MTS Health Partners to advance clinical programs and increase stockholder value.

news.summary: Today, on April 9, 2025, Bon Secours Mercy Health, Inc. (BSMH) disclosed pricing details for a tender offer. The offer was initially presented in the Offer to Purchase dated March 25, 2025. Under this offer, BSMH invited holders to submit tenders, with specific conditions outlined in the Offer to Purchase.

news.summary: An educator from Tennessee will lead a new initiative launched by an innovative curriculum developer. The Virstone Preparatory Academy is now open for parents looking into personalized and adaptable learning solutions for the upcoming 2025-2026 school year. The academy, located in Nashville, Tennessee, is offering a unique educational experience for students.
news.headline: New Virstone Preparatory Academy in Tennessee offers personalized learning for 2025-2026 school year.

news.summary: Bus employees at All-Star Transportation in Waterbury, Connecticut, have achieved significant progress by securing a landmark 46% wage increase and gaining eligibility for the Teamsters Pension. The bus drivers and monitors, who are represented by Teamsters Local 671, overwhelmingly approved these changes in their first collective bargaining agreement. This historic achievement signifies a major step forward for the workers in the industry.
news.headline: Waterbury bus workers ratify first contract with historic 46% wage increases and access to Teamsters Pension.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs rescinded its prediction of an impending U.S. recession following President Trump's surprising 90-day tariff pause announcement, shifting back to a baseline forecast of 0.5% GDP growth in 2025 and a 45% chance of recession. The bank still anticipates three 25-basis-point Fed cuts in June, July, and September, reflecting a less dire economic outlook due to the tariff pause and signs of trade stabilization. Trump's strategy involves increasing pressure on China while offering negotiation paths for non-retaliating allies. The sudden change highlights the immediate impact of Trump's announcement on global markets.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs withdraws U.S. recession call after Trump's tariff pause, expects 0.5% GDP growth in 2025 with 45% recession probability.
Michigan business and automaker groups criticize Trump for failing to pause 25% auto tariffs – Statement

news.summary: U.S. stock futures took a sharp dip, dropping over 2-3% in premarket trading after President Trump invoked a 1977 law to declare a trade emergency, implementing new reciprocal tariffs primarily targeting China, Vietnam, Cambodia, and Sri Lanka. The exclusion of Canada and Mexico was noted. Gold prices hit a record high of $3,167.71 per ounce, prompting investors to turn to safe-haven assets as the 10-year Treasury bond yielded at 4.06% and the two-year bond at 3.78%. The probability of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged through May stood at 76.7%. The S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF plummeted in premarket trading. On the previous day, consumer discretionary, industrials, and financials led a rally on the S&P 500, despite concerns over trade tariffs, with Tesla Inc. rising by 5%. Positive economic data contrasted anxieties over the administration's trade policies. Senior economist Jeremy Siegel indicated a readiness to withstand current economic challenges for future gains.
news.headline: US stock futures drop over 2-3% after Trump's tariff announcement. Gold hits record high at $3,167.71 per ounce. Treasury bond yields increase. Markets predict 76.7% likelihood of Fed maintaining rates through May. Indices like Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq 100 plummeted. SPY and QQQ ETFs decline. Tesla surges despite weak deliveries. Mixed market response to positive economic data amidst trade tariff fears. Senior economist offers insights.

news.summary: Annaly Capital Management, Inc. has recently disclosed the schedule for releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company has announced that the financial results will be made public on specific dates and there will also be a conference call to discuss these results. Shareholders and interested parties can expect to access this information on the specified dates, providing an insight into the company's performance during the initial part of 2025. The details of this announcement indicate a proactive approach by Annaly Capital Management, Inc. in keeping its stakeholders informed about its financial standing and operations.
news.headline: Annaly Capital Management schedules Q1 2025 financial results and conference call dates.

news.summary: Investors on various prediction markets, including Myriad Markets, Kalshi, and Polymarket, have reduced the likelihood of a recession.
news.headline: US recession chances decrease as Trump delays retaliatory tariffs on majority of countries, per prediction markets.

news.summary: After working as the head of New York's social services department, Steven Banks expressed his desire to once again advocate for the rights of the homeless. However, he unexpectedly resigned shortly after an elite firm he was associated with finalized a deal with President Trump.
news.headline: Pro bono leader leaves Paul Weiss amid Trump crackdown on big law after deal made, citing return to homeless advocacy.

news.summary: In Aberdeen, Scotland, KNOT Offshore Partners LP (NYSE: KNOP) announced a quarterly cash distribution of US$0.026 per common unit for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The distribution will be payable on May 8, 2025, to all unitholders recorded by the close of business on April 28, 2025. The Partnership reiterates its confidence in the key elements of its strategy and valuation.
news.headline: KNOT Offshore Partners LP declares cash distribution of US$0.026 per common unit for Q1 2025, payable on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Richardson Electronics reported a net sales increase for the third consecutive quarter with Q3 FY25 net sales reaching $53.8 million, a 2.7% growth YoY. The surge was mainly from Semiconductor wafer fab sales which climbed 139% and Canvys sales increasing by 39.5%. The company ended the quarter with $36.7 million in cash and equivalents after selling a majority of Richardson Healthcare. However, net loss was $2.1 million, although excluding one-time charges results in a non-GAAP operating income of $2.2 million, up from $1.0 million in the same period last year. EBITDA for the quarter was -$2.1 million, improving to $2.8 million after adjusting for the Healthcare asset sale. The Board of Directors declared a $0.06 quarterly cash dividend per share. Their nine-month fiscal summary indicated an increase in net sales to $157.0 million, a 5.3% growth YoY, with an operating loss of $3.1 million but a non-GAAP operating income of $1.8 million. Non-GAAP net income was $1.4 million, and adjusted EBITDA was $4.5 million for the nine-month period. In addition, financial measures were reported using both GAAP and non-GAAP metrics to provide a comprehensive view of the company’s performance.
news.headline: Richardson Electronics reports net sales of $53.8 million in Q3 FY25; operating loss of $2.7 million. Quarterly cash dividend declared.

news.summary: Denver-based company Royal Gold will be taking part in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series scheduled for Wednesday, April 23, 2025. Royal Gold's involvement in the event highlights their commitment to engaging with investors and showcasing their business strategies. The roadshow presents a valuable opportunity for Royal Gold to connect with a wide audience of potential stakeholders. This participation reflects the company's proactive approach to investor relations and emphasizes transparency in their communications.
news.headline: Royal Gold will join Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow on April 23, 2025.

news.summary: In Wildlight, Florida, Rayonier Inc. (NYSE: RYN) is set to announce its Q1 2025 earnings post-market closure on April 30, 2025. The company will conduct a conference call and live audio webcast on May 1 at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to delve into the results. For supplementary resources and the live webcast, interested parties can visit www.rayonier.com. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be stored on the company’s site for access. Investors are encouraged to participate in this event to gain insights into Rayonier's performance.

news.summary: The president has increased tariffs on China even more, adding to the already high rates. He stated that Beijing's response to his previous trade measures was unwarranted.
news.headline: President Trump announces 90-day pause on global tariffs, increases tariffs on China in response to retaliation.

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet, a prominent provider of business data and analytics, has unveiled its latest quarterly 2025 Global Business Optimism Insights report. The report shows a 1.3% decrease in business optimism compared to the previous quarter, which had experienced a significant 12.9% decline. This ongoing trend is attributed to uncertainties in the global economy and increasing trade protectionism, which are affecting business sentiment worldwide. Additionally, financial confidence has also decreased by 8.6%, reflecting the challenging economic conditions. The company is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DNB.
news.headline: Global business optimism declines 1.3% quarter-over-quarter to 12.9%, due to trade policy uncertainties and high interest rates.

news.summary: QuantumScape Corporation, a pioneer in solid-state lithium-metal batteries (NYSE: QS), is set to unveil its 2025 Q1 business figures post-market on April 23, 2025. A conference call is scheduled at 2 p.m. PT (5 p.m. ET) on the same day with CEO Siva Sivaram and CFO Kevin Hettrich present. The announcement was made on April 9.
news.headline: QuantumScape to reveal Q1 2025 business results on April 23; CEO and CFO to host conference call at 2pm PT (5pm ET).

news.summary: A company called Horizon Technology Finance Corporation, affiliated with Monroe Capital and trading on NASDAQ under HRZN, shared its Q1 2025 portfolio update. Horizon specializes in providing secured loans to venture capital-backed firms in technology, life science, healthcare information, and sustainability sectors. They released details about their lending platform in Farmington, Conn. as of March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Horizon Technology Finance (NASDAQ: HRZN) updates its Q1 2025 portfolio, specializing in secured loans for tech and healthcare.

news.summary: A company headquartered in Henderson, Nevada named Paysign, Inc. will be participating in the Ladenburg Thalmann Technology Innovation Expo 25. This event is significant for the company as it provides a platform to showcase its innovations and technology. It indicates recognition in the tech industry and can lead to potential partnerships or investments. Such expos are crucial for networking and gaining visibility among industry leaders. Paysign, Inc.'s participation at this event highlights its commitment to technological advancement and its desire to stay at the forefront of industry developments.
news.headline: Paysign, Inc. to showcase at Ladenburg Thalmann Technology Innovation EXPO25 in HENDERSON, Nevada.

news.summary: BWX Technologies, Inc. disclosed today that it has received a contract from the U.S. Department of Energy to oversee and run the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. This responsibility will be carried out by Strategic Storage Partners, LLC, a joint venture between APTIM Federal Services and BWXT Technical Services Group, Inc. The contract is valued at around $2.6 billion and spans a 10-year period. The agreement consists of a five-year initial term, with the option to extend for an additional five years.
news.headline: BWXT, APTIM, and Strategic Storage Partners awarded $2.6B contract to manage Strategic Petroleum Reserve structures and systems.

news.summary: Artisan Partners Asset Management Inc. announced today that their preliminary assets under management as of March 31, 2025 were $162.4 billion. Of this total, $79.2 billion came from Artisan Funds and Artisan Global Funds, while $83.2 billion originated from separate accounts and other AUM. The company's AUM composition highlights a balanced distribution between fund-based and other managed assets, showcasing a robust financial portfolio.
news.headline: Artisan Partners Asset Management reported $162.4 billion AUM as of March 31, 2025, with Artisan Funds and Artisan Global Funds totaling $79.2 billion.

news.summary: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. disclosed on April 9, 2025, that David Collins, a seasoned financial executive with a background in live entertainment and sports, will be joining the company. Collins brings a wealth of experience and expertise to MSG Entertainment, listed on the NYSE under the symbol MSGE. This move is expected to leverage Collins' industry knowledge and strategic acumen for the company's growth in the competitive market.
news.headline: MSG Entertainment appoints David Collins as Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer. #NYSE: MSGE #April925.

news.summary: In Denver on April 9, 2025, Antero Resources (NYSE: AR) shared that they will release their first quarter 2025 earnings on April 30, 2025, after NYSE trading hours. They will hold a conference call to discuss these earnings.
